systems.name: opencode
systems.description: Self-hosted Claude-Code-derivative bundle; this hotfix patches the codex provider package's WS→SSE boundary contract

containers.name: codex provider (packages/opencode-codex-provider)
containers.description: Provider package implementing AI SDK LanguageModelV2 against Codex Responses API

components.name: transport-ws.ts:getSnapshot
components.description: PATCHED: returns explicit TransportSnapshot with wsFrameCount field instead of {...wsObs} spread; aligns with the public boundary used by sse.ts and data-schema.json

components.name: sse.ts flush block (transportSnapshot consumer)
components.description: Reads transportSnapshot.wsFrameCount; previously got undefined because transport-ws spread the internal frameCount field name; no change in this hotfix beyond gaining real data

components.name: empty-turn-classifier.ts predicate ladder
components.description: Now receives numeric wsFrameCount and can correctly select ws_truncation (>0) vs ws_no_frames (===0); no code change

components.name: empty-turn-log.ts JSONL append + bus publish
components.description: Receives payload with wsFrameCount populated; JSON.stringify no longer drops the field as undefined; no code change

relationships.description: getTransportSnapshot() returns TransportSnapshot with explicit wsFrameCount
Hands classification + snapshot fields to logger
